form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.86) behind Aston Pluto in a T3 Grade 6 on April 10. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 14 length fifth over 425m at Bendigo. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (22.54) over 390m at Warrnambool. Squeeze draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at the last two runs, both at Bendigo, the latest when beaten 11 lengths behind Broombrae Fritz over 425m. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.97) in a T3 Grade 6, finishing a 7 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from six starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.
